title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 159.10, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding below 0.7090, RBA still set to hike despite Australian consumer sentiment plunge; AUD carry supported, but growth concerns weigh.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD trading above 1.1765, Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on pair; rate divergence favours USD, but ECB on hold.

title: VIX
text: VIX at 19.1 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.02%.

title: AUD/NZD
text: AUD/NZD extreme short bias in retail sentiment, 89% short; watch for squeeze, contrarian reversal risk.
